name: NexGen Energy Ltd.
description: NexGen Energy Ltd. is a uranium development company advancing the Rook I project, its flagship 100%-owned uranium deposit located in the southwestern Athabasca Basin of Saskatchewan. Rook I received final federal regulatory approval and a Licence to Prepare Site and Construct from the Canadian Nuclear Safety Commission in early 2026, and is capable of producing up to 30 million pounds of uranium annually once in production — representing over 20% of current global uranium fuel supply. NexGen is a pre-production developer with one of the world's largest and highest-grade uranium deposits.
